title: Peach Ginger
subtitle: Freezer Smoothie Pack
description: A creamy, anti-inflammatory freezer smoothie with peach, spinach, ginger, and turmeric — packed with protein from cottage cheese and Greek yogurt.

steps.title: Prep the bag
steps.text: Add all bag contents to a zip-lock or reusable freezer bag:
steps.note: Seal and freeze. These keep for up to 3 months.

steps.title: Blend
steps.text: Add the frozen bag contents to a blender, then pour in:
bullets: ¼ cup plain full-fat Greek yogurt
steps.note: Blend on high for 45–60 seconds until completely smooth. Cottage cheese blends invisible — don't skip it.

notes.title: Protein
notes.body: The cottage cheese + Greek yogurt combo hits 20g protein without protein powder. Full-fat versions blend creamier and keep you fuller.

notes.title: Color
notes.body: The spinach will turn it green-ish — that's normal and doesn't affect the flavor at all.

notes.title: Freezer Prep
notes.body: Make a week's worth of bags at once. Pull one out each morning — no measuring, no mess.

notes.title: Carbs
notes.body: 21g is net carbs (total carbs minus fiber). Total carbs with fiber is 27g.
